# UC-10.18.7 · Broadcom Symantec DLP Incidents by Policy and Severity

## Description

DLP incidents show where sensitive data is leaving the organization. Rolling up counts by policy and severity highlights chronic problem areas, mis-tuned rules, and priority queues for analyst review.

## Value

Quantifies data-exfiltration risk for privacy and IP programs and helps balance false positives against real policy breaches.

## Implementation

(1) Forward DLP incidents into `index=dlp` with consistent severity normalization. (2) Map policies to data classification labels. (3) Dashboard for SOC and DPO review. (4) Alert on sustained high-severity counts. (5) Integrate with SOAR for tier-1 triage.

## SPL

```spl
index=dlp sourcetype="symantec:dlp:incident" earliest=-7d
| eval policy=coalesce(Policy_Name, policy_name, Policy, "unknown")
| eval sev=coalesce(Severity, severity, Incident_Severity, "medium")
| eval user=coalesce(User, user, Owner, owner, "")
| stats count by policy sev
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Heatmap (policy × severity), stacked bar, drillable table with sample incident IDs.

## References

- [Broadcom Symantec Data Loss Prevention documentation hub](https://knowledge.broadcom.com/external/article/298967/symantec-data-loss-prevention-documentation.html)
- [Splunk Lantern — DLP monitoring patterns](https://lantern.splunk.com/)
